primary_target.recent_activity_summary: Reposted EdFuel hiring announcement (4 months ago); posted her own 'I'm starting a new position' announcement (10 months ago). No recent activity besides reposts. Account has 1,303 followers and 500+ connections — active professional.

any_red_flags: Title is 'Senior Director of HR' not just 'HR Leader' — she is the most senior HR person at Carlos Rosario, not a mid-level team member. Message should acknowledge her seniority.
Only 10 months in role — relatively new, which could be an advantage (enthusiastic) or mean she's still onboarding and may not know all open req details yet.

outreach_message_coherence.notes: LinkedIn message says 'noticed your work on the HR team there' — accurate but undersells her seniority. Email mentions 'bilingual (English/Chinese) and worked with international student and teacher populations' — this is a genuine claim and aligns well with Carlos Rosario's adult immigrant mission. No fabricated claims found. Both messages are factually accurate. Minor improvement: acknowledge she's the SR DIRECTOR (not just 'HR team member') for better personalization.
